name: agent-session
description: Interactive session pickers for Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode

scripts.test: node --test claude-sessions.test.js codex-sessions.test.js opencode-sessions.test.js install.test.js install-windows.test.js
scripts.check: node --check claude/claude-sessions.js && node --check codex/codex-sessions.js && node --check opencode/opencode-sessions.js && node --check common/session-utils.js && node --check common/session-renderer.js && node --check common/session-transcript.js && bash -n install.sh

author: lizhian
